[ID: SCENE_07.1_THE_APPROACH]

[Technical Header]:
85mm medium close-up, 24fps, #3FA7D6 cold rim light raking from frame-left — single source, zero fill; sterile night-stairwell atmosphere; interior: bare concrete landing.

[Subject/Asset]:
[ANCHOR POINT] Pale crescent scar along the LEFT jaw, half-inch, aged to white. [CRITICAL] Set jaw, controlled resolve, no tremor. Male figure held at frame-left, squared to the numbered door. He draws the [Asset: Brass_Key] from his coat into his RIGHT hand, raising it to chest height.

[Action/State]:
Hero lifts the [Asset: Brass_Key] from an inner coat pocket with his RIGHT hand and settles it at chest height, gaze fixed on the lock plate. No wasted motion.

[Environment/Lighting]:
Primary: #3FA7D6 cold rim light, single source raking from frame-left across the jawline; no fill. The unlit half falls to a flat #0B0E14 void. Bare concrete landing; numbered door at the vanishing point.

[Temporal Constraint]:
5 seconds. Slow locked push-in, zero breath. Shot ends with the [Asset: Brass_Key] in the RIGHT hand at chest height, Hero at frame-left, gaze fixed on the lock — positioned for the threshold.
